body_txt: This trope defines a character who is interested in fantasy, sci-fi, computer stuff, or other manner of geeky pastimes. The difference between this character and Proud to Be a Geek is their total lack of embracing their geeky nature. To a vast majority of the population, they would never guess their geeky nature. Reasons for covering up their geekiness may stem from a perceived image of themselves they desire to maintain or running with a group of friends who aren't normally interested in that kind of stuff. Expect Freudian Slips when their topics of interest are discussed, and cries of ...Or So I Heard in a vain attempt to cover it up. See also Public Hater, Private Fan which can overlap with this. May have a Nerd Hoard dedicated to their geeky pastimes.
